content:
• A roll of 1-3 results in a “punishment”—the player is automatically locked into a worse scenario.

✔ Faction and Archetype Modifiers Apply:
• Certain archetypes are better at escaping.
• Certain factions may penalize or reward those who flee.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Prevents forced participation while ensuring risk.
✔ Adds another layer of tactical decision-making.
✔ Maintains game fairness—fleeing has pros and cons.

📜 3. Faction & Party Bonuses – Strength in Numbers

📜 Each faction, party, and archetype now has its own passive buffs.

✔ Faction Bonuses:
• The Archivists – Gain +1 to all knowledge-based skill checks.
• The Tricksters – Can reroll deception-related skill checks once per session.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 457 (chunk 457/555)
